entries.name: Clear conditions
entries.description: Good visibility around Neverwinter; locals go about normal business.

entries.name: Light wind
entries.description: A noticeable breeze carries smells, sounds and rumours through Neverwinter.

entries.name: Heavy cloud
entries.description: The sky presses low over Neverwinter, making colours dull and tempers short.

entries.name: Sudden rain or snow
entries.description: A quick change in weather disrupts travel and street life in Neverwinter.

entries.name: Difficult visibility
entries.description: Mist, glare, spray or blowing dust makes distance hard to judge near Neverwinter.

entries.name: Unsettled omen
entries.description: Animals, sailors or locals notice something odd in the air around Neverwinter.

entries.name: Harsh weather
entries.description: Travel around Neverwinter becomes tiring; checks may be needed if the party pushes on.

entries.name: Dangerous weather
entries.description: A storm, whiteout, heat surge or violent squall creates immediate complications at Neverwinter.
